author: codex-agent

patch.value: Establish a long-lived epic for converting manual governance sweeps into first-class pm capabilities with auditable dry-run and apply workflows.
Continuous governance automation and policy enforcement
Productize tracker-governance workflows so normalization, placeholder detection, and large-scale policy enforcement can run deterministically without ad-hoc scripts.

Governance automation roadmap includes deterministic normalization/reporting capabilities, validation checks for low-signal metadata, and safe operational workflows that reduce manual force-override churn while preserving ownership semantics.
Existing governance baseline metrics and pain points are documented from recent tracker sweep.
Replace manual sweeps with repeatable command-level workflows
Cuts governance maintenance cost and improves consistency
Reduces manual mutation risk and accelerates future tracker cleanup
Future agents can run governance upkeep through supported pm surfaces
Current standards-alignment required long scripted passes and ownership remediations that should be converted into productized workflows.
Re-run full tracker normalization manually and observe script-heavy operational burden.
Maintainers and agents gain safer, faster, and more deterministic governance maintenance.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search 'bulk governance normalization command pm tracker' --limit 20; pm search 'validate placeholder metadata blocked_reason unblock_note repro_steps' --limit 20; pm search 'ownership-safe batch mutation mode governance override' --limit 20; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Net-new because existing governance epics are historical execution snapshots rather than productized automation roadmap.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Roadmap will prioritize dry-run visibility,deterministic mutation plans,and safety semantics compatible with ownership and lock constraints.

message: Create epic for continuous governance automation roadmap

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Governance hardening run started (plan execution). Baseline findings: active_items=17, overdue_active=4, active_with_closed_parent=9, active_with_closure_like_metadata=6, validate warnings include missing_estimate=1, missing_resolution_fields=8, missing_linked_paths=9, and dangling dependency edge pm-ac8x->pm-y50x. Next actions: normalize tracker lifecycle/lineage metadata, repair stale links/dependency drift, then implement validate guardrails to prevent recurrence.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Governance normalization pass complete. Actions: closed stale active-complete items (pm-5dia, pm-qkx0, pm-hzh6, pm-doek, pm-ice4, pm-a4z3, pm-a228, pm-o5uw), repaired active lineage (pm-7lum->pm-5rjn, pm-lou4 parent=none), removed dangling dependency edge pm-ac8x->pm-y50x, backfilled missing resolution metadata on all flagged closed items, and removed stale missing linked-path references across affected historical items. Verification: pm validate --check-metadata --check-resolution --check-files --check-command-references --check-history-drift --scan-mode tracked-all => ok=true,warnings=0; active governance drift metrics now active_items=9, overdue_active=0, active_with_closed_parent=0, active_with_closure_like_metadata=0.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Final release-pass evidence for this governance cycle: full validate clean (warnings=0), health clean (ok=true), linked validate guardrail suites passed via pm test pm-dw5s --run, and full project regression/coverage/build passed. Backlog curated with net-new follow-up pm-urxb under pm-dw5s for configurable lifecycle pattern policies.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Progress update: closed child features pm-7lum (dedupe-audit deterministic duplicate clustering) and pm-jqgc (aggregate/list projection+sort/comments-audit filters/health refresh controls) with full build+test+coverage verification evidence recorded on each item.

value.text: 13-issue remediation lineage normalization: this open governance epic remains canonical parent for governance hardening scope in this wave (ownership-safe update overrides, update-many bulk workflow, mutation-triggered vector refresh hardening, and validate dependency-cycle diagnostics) to avoid duplicate epics.
